name: accounting firms processing 5–15 clients per quarter tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients per quarter, manual preparation causes delays in delivering financial statements. We automate the preparation instead of manual preparation using spreadsheets.
target_audience: accounting firms processing 5–15 clients per quarter
problem_solved: Manual preparation of quarterly financial statements is time-consuming and prone to errors.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual preparation of quarterly financial statements is time-consuming and prone to errors.
